title: conyza pusilla
intro: Conyza pusilla, also known as dwarf fleabane, is a small annual herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Conyza pusilla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Conyza pusilla can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health issues.
